shortDescription.text: The analyzed code was found to be safe and free of malicious or suspicious patterns.

fullDescription.text: This rule indicates that a thorough analysis, including verification against external threat intelligence, did not identify any malicious, suspicious, or vulnerable patterns within the provided source code. The code adheres to secure coding practices or performs only benign operations.

message.text: Verification confirmed the code is safe. No malicious patterns found. The initial analysis indicated safe, legitimate software engineering practices for managing large data and tool orchestration, and no external threat intelligence was found to refute this. All described actions (e.g., redirecting output, using temporary directories) are standard in secure and efficient workflow design.
